creator: ohartmann@walstatt.org
text:
On FreeBSD 11.2-RELENG, running port net-mgmt/icinga2 (icinga2-2.8.4) with www/icingaweb2 (icingaweb2-2.5.3), we receive on all screens/dashboards/windows this error:

[...]
Fatal error: Uncaught ErrorException: include_once(): file:// wrapper is disabled in the server configuration in /usr/local/www/icingaweb2/library/vendor/Zend/Loader.php:132 Stack trace: #0 /usr/local/www/icingaweb2/library/vendor/Zend/Loader.php(132): Icinga\Application\ApplicationBootstrap->Icinga\Application\{closure}(2, 'include_once():...', '/usr/local/www/...', 132, Array) #1 /usr/local/www/icingaweb2/library/vendor/Zend/Loader.php(132): include_once() #2 /usr/local/www/icingaweb2/library/vendor/Zend/Loader.php(81): Zend_Loader::loadFile('Zend/Loader/Plu...', NULL, true) #3 /usr/local/www/icingaweb2/library/vendor/Zend/Loader/Autoloader.php(479): Zend_Loader::loadClass('Zend_Loader_Plu...') #4 /usr/local/www/icingaweb2/library/vendor/Zend/Loader/Autoloader.php(124): Zend_Loader_Autoloader->_autoload('Zend_Loader_Plu...') #5 [internal function]: Zend_Loader_Autoloader::autoload('Zend_Loader_Plu...') #6 /usr/local/www/icingaweb2/library/vendor/Zend/Loader/PluginLoader.php(418): spl_autoload_call('Zend_Loader_Plu...') in /usr/local/www/icingaweb2/library/vendor/Zend/Loader.php on line 132
[...]

Zend is www/zend-framework1 (Zendframewor1-1.12.16).

Sometimes this error/bug is verys sticky and makes it impossible to use the webinterface for Icinga2.
